rows.label: qev085906_MSG0001
rows.name: You had the pizza delivered to us, yes![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085906_MSG0002
rows.name:
Very, very happy. My family
is absolutely overjoyed, no![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085906_MSG0004
rows.name: So, will you process it for us!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085906_MSG0006
rows.name:
I will pour all my skill into crafting
a very, very cute bracelet, yes![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085906_MSG0007
rows.name: Sorry for the wait, no. Look, it is finished.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085906_MSG0008
rows.name: Yes! With this, Dorothy-san will surely...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085906_MSG0010
rows.name:
Um, thank you all so much. I'm going to head
over to Dorothy-san's place right now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085906_MSG0011
rows.name:
Thank goodness. I hope it goes
well for you, Shingo-san.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085906_MSG0012
rows.name: Shall we go take a look?[ST:wait ]
